name: gitwarp
description: Agent Skill and CLI for isolated Git worktrees, dispatch, context, and handoff dossiers.

interface.shortDescription: Isolated Git worktrees and handoff dossiers for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp as a standard Agent Skill plus CLI to enter with context, dispatch or start isolated git worktree sandboxes, inspect dossiers, hand off progress, audit state, and finish safely.
defaultPrompt: Run gitwarp enter --cwd "$PWD" before repository work.
For parallel or isolated work, dispatch or start a GitWarp workspace with task.md, progress.md, and lessons.md.
Inspect context and read task.md, progress.md, and lessons.md before editing inside a sandbox.
